task_description: Implement BudgetWise landing page with Hero section, Features section, Email capture form with client-side validation, Header, and Footer. Fully responsive (360px-1440px), semantic HTML, accessible, built with Next.js 16 App Router and Tailwind CSS 4.

verification.summary: Build compiles successfully and generates static pages. ESLint passes with no errors. No test framework configured (only lint available). All PRD acceptance criteria met: semantic HTML landmarks, responsive Tailwind classes, accessible form with client-side validation and success/error states, clear value proposition hero section, benefit-oriented feature descriptions.
